descFull: Your AI forgets. This remembers. Spec-driven coding harness for vibecoders, product owners, CEOs and real builders — self-improving context memory, 15 agents, 33 skills working with /goal, agent-team, & workflow on autopilot loops with 0 need for human gate. Kills context rot, ships features, not spaghetti. Claude Code & Codex. Any stack
